case_title: KEVIN HOLLINGSWORTH VS. SAN FRANCISCO TENNIS ACADEMY, LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLLINGSWORTH, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TENNIS ACADEMY, LLC $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $815.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY HOLLINGSWORTH, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TENNIS ACADEMY, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85. SERVED NOV-27-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TENNIS ACADEMY, LLC
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY HOLLINGSWORTH, KEVIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF KEVIN HOLLINGSWORTH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TENNIS ACADEMY, LLC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
